news.summary: In San Jose, California, ZEDEDA, a leader in edge management and orchestration, has been chosen by A.P. Moller - Maersk (Maersk) to power edge orchestration on its upcoming IoT connectivity platform. This decision comes after multiple revisions to the initial announcement dated May 6, 2025. Maersk's selection of ZEDEDA signifies a strategic move towards utilizing advanced technology, with ZEDEDA playing a crucial role in enabling Maersk's next-generation IoT connectivity platform. This partnership showcases the growing importance of edge computing in the industry.
news.headline: Maersk chooses ZEDEDA for Edge Orchestration on IoT platform. A.P. Moller - Maersk selects ZEDEDA for next-gen IoT platform.

news.summary: Bethesda, Maryland-based Walker & Dunlop, Inc. has bolstered its Investment Sales division in the Southeast U.S. by bringing on John Carr as managing director. Operating out of Atlanta, Georgia, Carr's main role will involve overseeing the initiation and completion of multifamily property transactions across the Southeastern region. Before his tenure at Walker & Dunlop, Carr held the position of managing director at Cushman & Wakefield. In this role, he focused on managing institutional and middle market deals, demonstrating expertise in this sector.
news.headline: Walker & Dunlop expands Investment Sales team in Southeast U.S. with the addition of managing director John Carr in Atlanta.

news.summary: Panama City Beach, Florida - The St. Joe Company is set to host its Annual Meeting of Shareholders in 2025.
news.headline: St. Joe Company holds 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting in Panama City Beach, Florida.

news.summary: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. disclosed in Atlanta today that it has successfully priced a public offering of $40 million in total principal of its 9.750% Senior Notes due 2030. These Notes will be backed by a full and secure guarantee on a senior unsecured basis by Angel Oak Mortgage Operating Partnership, LP, the entity through which the Company manages its assets and business activities. The issuance of the Notes will be completed in the near future.
news.headline: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. priced $40M of 9.750% Senior Notes due 2030 in public offering, guaranteed by Angel Oak Mortgage OP.

news.summary: Vancouver-based Integra Resources Corp. (TSXV: ITR, NYSE American: ITRG) has released its financial and operational outcomes for the three-month period concluding on March 31, 2025. The company expressed contentment with its performance during this timeframe. Details can be found on their website www.integraresources.com.
news.headline: Integra reports Q1 2025 results, highlighting strong performance from Florida Canyon Gold Mine, growing cash position.

news.summary: Today, H Partners Management, LLC, a major shareholder of Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG), owning approximately 9.3% of the shares, shared their thoughts on the preliminary outcomes of the Company’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The management expressed gratitude towards fellow shareholders, dealers, riders, and employees.
news.headline: H Partners secure mandate for change at Harley-Davidson's 2025 Annual Meeting with 9.3% share ownership.

news.summary: In Salem, New Jersey, New Jersey American Water and the City of Salem have initiated a significant infrastructure project to improve water quality and public health for numerous residents in the area. The groundbreaking event marked the commencement of work on an advanced PFAS removal system at the Salem Water Treatment Plant. This development is crucial in guaranteeing the provision of safe, clean, and consistent drinking water for the community members relying on the plant's services. The project is an important investment in the local water system and will benefit thousands of residents in Salem, New Jersey.
news.headline: New Jersey American Water & Salem City start construction on PFAS treatment system at Salem Water Treatment Plant, benefiting thousands.

news.summary: The Elevate Prize Foundation has honored the beloved characters from Sesame Street for their impactful teaching that has influenced multiple generations of children. The recognition celebrates the values of compassion, kindness, and well-being instilled by the characters, emphasizing the importance of securing their future. Previous recipients of this prestigious award have included prominent figures such as Dwyane Wade, Michael J. Fox, and Matt Damon.
news.headline: Sesame Street gets $250k from Elevate Prize Foundation for global impact in teaching compassion. Past recipients include Dwyane Wade, Michael J. Fox, Matt Damon.
HENGRUI PHARMA OFFERS HK SHARES AT HK$41.45- HK$44.05 EACH

news.summary: Vertex Resource Group Ltd. reported gross revenue of $56.5 million and adjusted EBITDA of $5.2 million for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025. The company's financial and operational results were supported by strong performance in its Environmental Consulting segment and drilling-related services within the Environmental Services division. Despite global trade tensions impacting propane and butane hauling operations, Vertex managed to maintain a profit margin of 21% and reduce G&A expenses by 15% compared to the previous year. The company reduced loans and borrowings by $3.1 million during the quarter and is cautious about the operating environment due to tariff uncertainties. The outlook suggests potential easing of tariff-related uncertainty by late 2025 or early 2026, with strategic adjustments being made by Vertex in response to market conditions.
news.headline: Vertex Resource Group Ltd. reported Q1 2025 results with $56.5M in revenue and $5.2M in adjusted EBITDA. Challenges from global trade tensions affecting operations. G&A expenses reduced by 15%, finance costs down 18% YoY, and loans/lease liabilities reduced by $3.1M during the quarter. Anticipating tariff uncertainty easing by late 2025 or early 2026.
Daly: uncertainty shock not yet causing a demand shock
Daly: uncertainty could impact economy

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, the Board of Directors of Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) announced a cash dividend of $0.18 per share for the second quarter of 2025. Shareholders of record of the company's common stock as of June 2 will receive the dividend, which is payable on June 18, 2025.
news.headline: Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) declares dividend of $0.18 per share for Q2 2025, payable on June 18.

news.summary: The article discusses the factors influencing the price rally of Ethereum (ETH), including the need for SEC approval for in-kind ETF creation and staking to attract more investors. Despite a recent surge of 43.6% between May 7 and May 14, ETH's current price of $2,600 still falls short of its 2021 peak of $4,868. There are predictions of a near-term rally to $5,000, but uncertainty remains about catalysts for a new all-time high in 2025. US-listed Ether ETFs experienced net outflows of $4 million between May 12-13, highlighting a lack of institutional appetite compared to Bitcoin. Ether is seen as the best institutional diversification candidate due to regulatory clarity and accessibility, with potential for momentum from in-kind creation and staking approvals. The article also touches on Ethereum's need for increased on-chain activity to restore its deflationary burn mechanism, with the recent 'Pectra' upgrade enhancing scalability. AI adoption, particularly in Ethereum's layer-2 infrastructure, is seen as a potential catalyst for future growth and reaching a new all-time high for ETH in 2025.
news.headline: Ethereum's potential rally to $5,000 in 2025 hinges on SEC approval, AI adoption, and layer-2 growth boosting network activity. ETH surged 43.6% in May but is now at $2,600, short of 2021 peak. Ether ETF market lags behind Bitcoin's $121.5B, raising doubts about institutional interest. Despite competition, Ether could benefit from lack of ETF rivals with possible upcoming approvals. 'Pectra' upgrade enhances scalability for AI adoption. Analysts see AI as a key to Ethereum's future growth towards $5,000.
Daly: Uncertainty Depresses Activity
Daly: shock to sentiment not reflected in broad pullback in consumer and business spending

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Bombardier Inc. disclosed the pricing completion for its new Senior Notes issuance, totaling US$500 million with a maturity date of June 15, 2033. These Senior Notes will have a 6.750% annual coupon rate and will be issued at par value. The anticipated closing date for the issuance is set for around May 29, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.
news.headline: Bombardier prices $500 million in 6.750% Senior Notes due 2033, expected to close on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Montreal-based Bombardier Inc. has announced a conditional notice of partial redemption for $500 million of its 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027. The redemption date is set for June 13, 2025, with a redemption price of 100.00% of the principal amount plus accrued and unpaid interest. This redemption is contingent on Bombardier successfully launching a new debt securities offering of at least $500 million before the redemption date, although the company holds the discretion to delay or waive this condition.
news.headline: Bombardier plans to redeem US$500M of 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027 on Jun 13, 2025, contingent on new debt offering.

news.summary: This press release should not be shared or distributed in the United States to US newswire services or individuals residing in the United States.
news.headline: Questerre has released its first quarter 2025 results. This news is not for distribution in the United States.

news.summary: eToro, a stock brokerage and crypto trading platform, saw a 29% increase in its shares on Wednesday after its debut on Nasdaq. The shares closed at approximately $67.
news.headline: eToro, a stock and crypto trading platform, hits $5.4B market cap with Nasdaq debut. Shares close at $67, up 29%.

news.summary: In a show of protest, city employees caused disruption at city hall in San Francisco on May 14, 2025. They unfurled banners and demanded the Mayor's immediate action to safeguard public services. The demonstration was organized by city unions, including IFPTE Local 21, SEIU Local 1021, and the SF Building Trades. The rally was conducted urgently as the City's budget process commenced, highlighting the employees' concerns.
news.headline: SF city workers rally at City Hall on May 14, 2025, against service cuts and layoffs. Multiple unions involved.
Eletrobras reports partial closure of sale of thermal power plants

news.summary: The Ethereum Foundation has launched the Trillion Dollar Security Initiative to enhance the security of Ethereum's role in programmable digital assets. Fredrik Svantes and Josh Stark are the co-chairs, with contributions from samczsun, Medhi Zerouali, and Zach Obront. Ethereum remains the top ecosystem for DeFi with a TVL of nearly $80 billion as of May 14, holding 50-60% of total value locked across all blockchains since May 2022. Ethereum has faced challenges in the bull market, but the Pectra upgrade has seen significant improvements, leading to a 43% increase in ETH price since May 7. Ethereum aims to attract trillions of dollars in onchain security with broad ecosystem support.
news.headline: Ethereum Foundation initiates Trillion Dollar Security plan to boost onchain tech adoption, with TVL at $80 billion on May 14.ETH price jumps 43% post-Pectra upgrade, magazine ponders comeback in 2025.

news.summary: Early trading in the stock market today saw the Dow Jones Industrial Average decline, while leading tech company Nvidia experienced gains. Nvidia, along with a few other tech leaders, showed positive movement. The latest data indicates that the Dow Jones slipped, Nvidia overtook Apple's position, and AMD also saw a rise. This information is part of the live coverage on current stock market activities and trends.
news.headline: Dow Jones slips, Nvidia gains, AMD shoots higher in stock market today. Tech leaders performing well.

news.summary: On Wednesday, the stock market experienced a temporary halt in its growth but remained within a positive trend. Notably, Nvidia and Tesla continued to see increases in their stock value. CoreWeave and Cisco also made significant moves in terms of earnings later in the day. This update on Dow Jones Futures indicates a brief pause in the market's momentum, with key players such as Nvidia and Tesla still on an upward trajectory, while CoreWeave and Cisco are making noteworthy strides in earnings.
news.headline: Market trends bullish; Dow Jones pauses. Nvidia, Tesla rise. CoreWeave, Cisco noted in late earnings movers.

news.summary: In Miami on May 14, 2025, Royal Caribbean Group revealed an update on its financial situation. The company, listed on NYSE as RCL, disclosed the enhancement and expansion of its two unsecured revolving credit facilities. The modifications resulted in a boost of $2.28 billion in commitments, split evenly between the two facilities, thus increasing the financial support available to the company significantly.
news.headline: Royal Caribbean Group increased its unsecured revolving credit facilities by $2.28 billion, now totaling $4.56 billion.

news.summary: In a recent statement, FrontView REIT, Inc. (NYSE: FVR) shared its performance results for Q1 of 2025 and revised its full-year 2025 forecast. Stephen Preston, Co-CEO and Chairman, expressed satisfaction with the first quarter results, highlighting success in acquisitions and operations. The Company's proactive approach led to notable achievements during this period.
news.headline: FrontView REIT (NYSE: FVR) reported successful Q1 2025 with strong acquisitions. Management optimistic about operational performance.

news.summary: Today in New York City, on May 14, 2025, renowned artist and successful businesswoman Megan Thee Stallion unveiled her latest venture - the debut of her personally curated swimwear line, Hot Girl Summer. The collection boasts 18 diverse pieces, showcasing a commitment to size inclusivity. Megan Thee Stallion, a recipient of three Grammy awards, is making waves in the fashion industry with her latest entrepreneurial pursuit.
news.headline: Megan Thee Stallion debuts self-designed swimwear brand 'Hot Girl Summer' at Walmart on May 19, with 18 size-inclusive pieces.

news.summary: Currently, the fate of the Trump administration's plan to drastically reduce the bureau lies in the hands of the courts.
news.headline: Court to decide fate of Trump administration's downsizing of CFPB, GOP argues it's inefficient.

news.summary: The increase in the stock market on Tuesday and Wednesday suggests that efforts through public and private lobbying are starting to show positive results.
news.headline: Stock market gains on Tuesday and Wednesday are seen as lobbying efforts bear fruit, halting volatility.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Crowd Power Ventures (“CPV”), a venture studio and strategic investment partner for disruptors in media, marketing, and advertising, has unveiled a $20 million fund aimed at developing an integrated marketing ecosystem for the creator economy. This industry segment is anticipated to skyrocket to $848 billion by 2032, with around 8.1 million young professionals globally generating income through content creation. Despite its flourishing nature, the creator economy is encountering challenges as it expands.
news.headline: Venture studio CPV to launch $20M fund for creator economy in media, marketing, and advertising. Creator economy to reach $848B by 2032 with 8.1M young professionals.

news.summary: In an announcement made today, dunnhumby, a prominent player in AI customer data science, and Bridg, a leading identity resolution platform behind Rippl data and media network, revealed a strategic collaboration. The Head of Corporate Development at dunnhumby, Leo Nagdas, expressed excitement about the partnership, emphasizing plans to offer exclusive retail media and loyalty solutions. Through their combined expertise, the two companies aim to assist retailers and brands in enhancing customer value.
news.headline: dunnhumby and Bridg partner to boost customer reach and retail media activation. Potential to enhance customer engagement.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%. This marks a decrease of 0.5% from the previous month and is the lowest rate seen in the past 10 years. The report also stated that 250,000 new jobs were created in the latest quarter, a significant increase from the previous year. Additionally, wage growth has been reported at 3.8%, reflecting an improving economy and job market conditions.Experts believe that these positive trends are a result of increased consumer spending and business confidence, leading to a boost in overall economic activity. This news has been welcomed by policymakers and analysts alike, who see it as a sign of a strengthening economy and a positive outlook for the future.
news.headline: Private student lenders are ready for success under GOP-controlled Washington, with significant potential gains expected.

news.summary: Several proposals are being considered by Republicans to eliminate tax breaks utilized by financial institutions as they search for ways to finance the tax cuts promised by Trump.
news.headline: GOP considering proposals to eliminate tax breaks for financial institutions to pay for Trump's promised tax cuts.

news.summary: Prominent House Democrats are asking the U.S. Treasury for access to suspicious activity reports linked to cryptocurrency activities by the Trump family.
news.headline: Democrats in the House ask Treasury for reports on Trump's crypto venture, World Liberty Financial.

news.summary: A company has announced plans to privatize specific assets within its Fresh Produce segment. This move comes as the company aims to streamline its operations and focus on core businesses. As part of the privatization process, the company will enter into supply agreements for the retained assets to ensure continued operational efficiency. This strategic decision is expected to optimize the company's resources and drive growth in key areas.
news.headline: Village Farms International to privatize assets of Fresh Produce segment; entering supply agreements - transformative move.

news.summary: The U.S. brand is currently under scrutiny by Wall Street CEOs and Washington power brokers, who are questioning if it has begun a lasting decline.
news.headline: US assets in potential decline, sparking concerns among Wall Street CEOs and Washington power brokers about a sustained downturn.
